# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Output (SPDX)
# Covers: SPDX 2.3 output, primary package, DESCRIBES relationship, DEPENDS_ON,
# package checksums, purl external ref, supplier.

exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --format spdx --spec-version 2.3 -o out.spdx.json
exists out.spdx.json

# --- Document ---
exec jq -e '.spdxVersion == "SPDX-2.3"' out.spdx.json
exec jq -e '.dataLicense == "CC0-1.0"' out.spdx.json
exec jq -e '.name == "app"' out.spdx.json
exec jq -e '.creationInfo.creators[0] | test("Tool")' out.spdx.json

# --- Primary package ---
exec jq -e '[.packages[].name] | contains(["app"])' out.spdx.json
exec jq -e '.packages[] | select(.name == "app") | .versionInfo == "1.0.0"' out.spdx.json

# --- Component package ---
exec jq -e '[.packages[].name] | contains(["libmqtt"])' out.spdx.json
exec jq -e '.packages[] | select(.name == "libmqtt") | .versionInfo == "4.3.0"' out.spdx.json
exec jq -e '.packages[] | select(.name == "libmqtt") | .licenseConcluded == "MIT"' out.spdx.json
exec jq -e '.packages[] | select(.name == "libmqtt") | .checksums[0].algorithm == "SHA256"' out.spdx.json
exec jq -e '.packages[] | select(.name == "libmqtt") | .externalRefs[] | select(.referenceType == "purl")' out.spdx.json

# --- Relationships ---
exec jq -e '[.relationships[].relationshipType] | contains(["DESCRIBES"])' out.spdx.json
exec jq -e '[.relationships[].relationshipType] | contains(["DEPENDS_ON"])' out.spdx.json

# SPDX 2.2 backward compat
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --format spdx --spec-version 2.2 -o out22.spdx.json
exec jq -e '.spdxVersion == "SPDX-2.2"' out22.spdx.json

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme Corp
  license:
    id: Apache-2.0
-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    {
      "name": "libmqtt",
      "version": "4.3.0",
      "type": "library",
      "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": { "name": "acme" },
      "purl": "pkg:generic/acme/libmqtt@4.3.0",
      "hashes": [
        { "algorithm": "SHA-256", "value": "9f86d081884c7d659a2feaa0c55ad015a3bf4f1b2b0b822cd15d6c15b0f00a08" }
      ],
      "external_references": [
        { "type": "distribution", "url": "https://acme.example/dl/libmqtt" }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
